input.question: Compare departments across all evaluation dimensions

payload.question: Compare departments across all evaluation dimensions

output.sql:
WITH dept_avgs AS (
  SELECT
    department AS department,
    AVG(communication_score) AS avg_communication,
    AVG(technical_score) AS avg_technical,
    AVG(teamwork_score) AS avg_teamwork,
    AVG(leadership_score) AS avg_leadership,
    AVG(problem_solving_score) AS avg_problem_solving
  FROM employee_evaluations
  GROUP BY department
)
SELECT department AS department, 'Communication' AS dimension, avg_communication AS avg_score FROM dept_avgs
UNION ALL
SELECT department AS department, 'Technical' AS dimension, avg_technical AS avg_score FROM dept_avgs
UNION ALL
SELECT department AS department, 'Teamwork' AS dimension, avg_teamwork AS avg_score FROM dept_avgs
UNION ALL
SELECT department AS department, 'Leadership' AS dimension, avg_leadership AS avg_score FROM dept_avgs
UNION ALL
SELECT department AS department, 'Problem Solving' AS dimension, avg_problem_solving AS avg_score FROM dept_avgs
ORDER BY department, dimension;

visualization.title: Average evaluation scores by department across all dimensions

payload.sql:
WITH dept_avgs AS (
  SELECT
    department AS department,
    AVG(communication_score) AS avg_communication,
    AVG(technical_score) AS avg_technical,
    AVG(teamwork_score) AS avg_teamwork,
    AVG(leadership_score) AS avg_leadership,
    AVG(problem_solving_score) AS avg_problem_solving
  FROM employee_evaluations
  GROUP BY department
)
SELECT department AS department, 'Communication' AS dimension, avg_communication AS avg_score FROM dept_avgs
UNION ALL
SELECT department AS department, 'Technical' AS dimension, avg_technical AS avg_score FROM dept_avgs
UNION ALL
SELECT department AS department, 'Teamwork' AS dimension, avg_teamwork AS avg_score FROM dept_avgs
UNION ALL
SELECT department AS department, 'Leadership' AS dimension, avg_leadership AS avg_score FROM dept_avgs
UNION ALL
SELECT department AS department, 'Problem Solving' AS dimension, avg_problem_solving AS avg_score FROM dept_avgs
ORDER BY department, dimension;
